response.title: Chief Operating Officer (COO)
response.description: Energy Innovations Inc. is seeking a Chief Operating Officer (COO) to lead our operations and drive strategic initiatives across the organization. The ideal candidate will have extensive experience in the energy sector, with a proven track record of enhancing operational efficiency and driving growth. This role requires strong leadership skills and the ability to collaborate with other executives to achieve organizational goals.

requirements.education: Master's degree in Business Administration or a related field
